name: China Xuefeng Environmental Engineering, Inc.
summary: China Xuefeng Environmental Engineering, Inc., through its subsidiaries, provides garbage-processing equipment in the People's Republic of China. Its equipment comprise waste digestion pretreatment system, methane gas power generation system, sorting processing system, bricklaying building system, leachate treatment system, distribution control system, XFET-5 ecological and water-saving toilets and excrement comprehensive processing system, and various material collection systems. The company also leases garbage-processing units; and recycles the garbage and manufacture products, such as ferrous metals, organic fertilizers, wood-plastic trays, and hollow bricks. China Xuefeng Environmental Engineering, Inc. was founded in 2007 and is based in Suqian, the People's Republic of China.
